content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学预计于5月18日08:00~12:00（UTC+8）进行校内设施维护。
       维护结束后需要重新登入并更新资源，补给物资将会通过信件向守密人发放。若有任何疑问，欢迎通过校区内客服中心咨询，感谢您的理解与支持！
    
【补给物资】
停服维护补偿：银芯×200、空幻之芯×5
     
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年6月1日09:00。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。
 
【更新内容】

一、活动

【纪念活动：致群星】
● 在 5 月 18 日 9:00 - 6 月 29 日 9:00 期间，每天登录都可领取 2.5 周年纪念限定 SSR 命轮「致群星」，至多可领取 16 个「致群星」。
● 命轮属性：黑印掉落
● 命轮效果：装备者自身、命轮、密契每有 1% 黑印掉落，结束战斗后回复 0.15/0.2/0.25/0.3% 最大生命，每回合结束就使该回复效果衰减 30%，多次独立计算。在「灰烬遗迹」中释放「感应」后，本次「灰烬遗迹」刷新无需消耗黑印。

【纪念活动：宛如梦幻的相逢】
● 在 5 月 18 日 9:00 - 6 月 29 日 9:00 期间，2.5 周年纪念活动「宛如梦幻的相逢」限时开放！
    ○ 完成以下目标最多可免费获取「空幻之芯」×250、唤醒体「沙耶」×1。
        ■ 完成登录一次：「空幻之芯」×50。
        ■ 完成「调查行动-忘却篇-第四章」普通模式：「空幻之芯」×50。
        ■ 完成「多维连接-被遗忘的爱之种」普通模式：「空幻之芯」×50。
        ■ 完成以上所有任务：「空幻之芯」×100、唤醒体「沙耶」×1。
        ■ 解锁高级纪行需要「源液」×3980，可额外获得奖励总计「空幻之芯」×250、「原初灵核」×3、「精粹原初灵核」×1、「灵魂回溯之芯」×1。

真的沒有人覺得校貓很好嬤嗎，每天凌晨兩三點下班的社畜一定沒有多餘的力氣抗拒親親抱抱，也許會報復性熬夜，也許會碰到床就睡，但是哪種都好一定很好推倒……趁着他半夢半醒的時候水煎一下還會用沒力氣的手軟綿綿地推開人，說着要上班別鬧之類的話……校貓怎麼樣都很好嬤吧，表現出溫柔勤懇制作人的樣子，每天出來發佈公告並且出來抗壓，一定是個很好推倒的上司吧……而如果他是個只會做做表面工夫的冷血商人，那也很好嬤，這種斯文敗類被壓在桌子上的時候想必還會不甘的想他怎麼不是上面那個呢……

content:
# 取消300抽加三圍
# Cancel 300 normal pull for stats

"Awakening Event: Echoing Wishes" requires twice the amount of pulls that a normal rate up banner does to guarantee the desired Awakener/WOD. The decreased amount of possible standard Awakener losses does not compensate for the fact that you cannot choose the item you actually want. Many awakeners are reliant or benefit greatly from multiple enlightens and considerably less from WOD dupes, or the WOD may not be highly valuable at all. Likewise, this can extend to a price increase in obtaining the base copy of a WOD. This banner is awful for both getting the base copy of a single desired item and chasing a specific Enlighten/WOD dupe, it does not benefit f2p players nor spending players. For many characters its as good as no rerun.
Paired with the complete randomness of "Kaleido Recollections Astral Reign" it feels as if a countermeasure to giving players more pulls was taken by providing no good special banners to use them on, and the time limit makes you unable to carry them over to dedicated reruns or better banners in future versions.
And https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1435676638439276694/1435676638439276694 ?
Wish granted, However, free 250 pulls removed 🙉

Hay tantos materiales que podrían utilizar y terminan acumulándose en montones, incluso algunos mucho más difíciles de conseguir que podrían aprovechar perfectamente, pero aun así deciden meterse con una de las monedas principales del gacha. Sinceramente, me parece una decisión bastante incoherente.
Despertar a Ramona: Loop cuesta 60 deseos, así que uno esperaría que las estadísticas que otorga este nuevo apartado fueran algo como 1k de salud, defensa y ataque para justificar el exceso de materiales requeridos cierto ? esto solo lo hace todavía peor, reciclar el uso de otras monedas para darles mas uso estaría bien .

Wow, this post have 2133 comments, this must be an exciting update 💀
這條帖子有2133條留言，一定是令人興奮的更新💀

Very few units will benefit from this pure core sink, only Caecus and Goliath and maybe Uvhash who already have good stat totals.

Maybe if it was slashed in half I'd say it's fine. But 300 is indeed too much. Every week a player is getting 17 pure cores if we count no other sources or story/event releases. Else it we add taboos to the week it's 22.

At most I will be placing 2 rank ups (60) on Uvhash and maybe Goliath  and won't be touching the system ever again.

But then again. If Devs are planning to have more ways of getting pure cores in general I can look past it.

I'm glad that standard units get love but you missed the mark



My real gripe was more with the rather lackluster banners. 24h doesn't hurt what really hurts is we can't target either wheel or awakener.

BIAV, Light I'm sure people would have spent far more if it were the usual banners. 

Stop making false promises for the love of god too.

<@1487626955791663208> 
I know you are well aware of the community sentiment by now. There's barely 29 hours at this moment to address the points.

With each announcements, the rotating banner gets worse.

1. 180 hard pity for 1 awakener
2. Free pulls not being available for the initial few characters
3. 24 hours fomo
4. New players who join midway during anni are not even given a chance to pull for the earlier banners.

Why is it always 2 steps forward and 2 steps back? The rewards are so good but the banner execution is terrible. 

Don't make an apology that's not even true anymore. 

I'm not even angry at this point. 

I'm just disappointed. 

<@1470253170209853632> <@1485258210209435701>

For the folks who are more in-tune with the traphase data:

> ■ Wheel of Destiny "Muddied Fairy Tale": Arithmetica Cost 3. After equipping, the wielder's "Strike", "Skill", and "Exalt" descriptions become unreadable, but each instance of DMG, Shield, and healing is randomly increased by 15%~35%.

I think the new Saya wheel looks a little strong since I assume that traphase card order in hand does not get shuffled as well under the unreadable/dissolution effect. 

Stirke -> Card 1 -> Card 2 -> Card 3

So with the ability to keep track of which cards were drawn/used and many awakeners being order agnostic for which abilities they want to use, is this wheel a little out of line in how powerful it is?

I don’t really know if this is related to the topic, but it honestly feels like the only characters that ever benefit from standard Aequor upgrades are these two, even though the other characters could get improvements just as good. A clear example is Faros. His AA is terrible, but apparently just increasing the percentage a little is considered “good enough” by the developers. Do they actually have favorites?
I’m also bringing this up because have you guys seen Faint’s AA? She’s a defensive character, yet her AA scales with attack. Is this supposed to be some kind of joke? <:24_Clown:1468259444423921871> <:dead:1356082627509092372>

I've been playing for a month and a half, spent some money and have been banking pulls for characters I missed. I was so excited for the anniversary, but the way these reruns have been handled has killed my enthusiasm for the game. I don't want to have to choose between paying extra for characters I've been excited for or waiting for a more reasonable rerun that may be months out. I don't want to accidentally miss a banner I want because I can't log in for a day. I still love the story, but the 'game' side of the game feels like it's letting me down.

I should be excited to be getting extra value for my past purchases. I should be looking forward to seeing what the game has for us next. I should be putting the money I invested in the game to use and feeling good about supporting the game in the future. I'm not, I feel like my support is taken for granted.

I also want to be enthusiastically encouraging my friends to try out the game, but I don't want to have to get them up to speed as soon as possible so they know what banners to pull on before they miss them. I don't want to have to get them playing as soon as possible so they don't start after an important rerun has already ended. And I don't want their first impression of the game to be FOMO blink-and-you'll-miss-it banners that are here and gone before they even have time to figure out whether they want the characters.
希望有在写小作文而不是冷处理，不然真的有点失望了<:dead:1356082627509092372>

I'm curious about the new SF talents. It says new effects so I wonder if they're going to be replacements for our current ones, or an add-on to the originals.

Tbh, I don't really mind the 300 pure cores stats buff. While I agree it can be lowered, the extra stats are certainly not a necessity. I see this as just another way to show your love to specific characters and not something I need to seriously pursue. Even if it was lower, I'm still gonna be pulling on +12 Wheels and Awakeners first, so I'll pretend this doesn't exist for now.
